name: AST Query
description: Query the abstract syntax tree of a source file. Find functions, classes, imports, and structural patterns without regex fragility. Supports TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, and Go.

parameters.name: includeBody
parameters.description: Include the full body/implementation of matched nodes

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Source language (auto-detected from extension if omitted)

outputDescription: Array of matched AST nodes: [{name, type, startLine, endLine, body?, children?}]. Returns empty array if no matches.
author: openspace
